baseBranch.description: The branch new feature branches are cut from. Usually 'main'.

branchPrefix.description: Prefix prepended to feature branches before the slug. Supports {type} (issue type label) and {user} (git user.name, alphanumeric lowercase) placeholders. Default: '{type}/issue-' produces 'feature/issue-42-add-x', 'epic/issue-42-add-x', etc. A literal string with no placeholders produces the same prefix for every branch.

language.description: Language for generated issue/PR/spec body. 'auto' = match the session language. 'ko'/'en' = force that language.

prdRepo.description: Optional cross-repo PRD repository slug ('<owner>/<name>'). When set, /sillok-start auto-suggests open epics from this repo and accepts cross-repo parent linking.

orgMode.description: Auto-detected by /sillok-init. true = org repo (Issue Types + linked branches). false = user repo (label fallback).

fullAuto.description: true = the sillok:workflow orchestrator chains stages (start → design → execute → end) without per-stage confirmation, stopping after PR creation (never merges). false (default) = propose mode: each next stage is proposed and waits for user confirmation.

automation.description: Workflow automation settings read by the sillok:workflow orchestrator skill. Absent keys fall back to the plugin template defaults (propose mode).

owner.description: Org owning the Projects v2 board.

statusField.description: Status field name on the project.

backlog.description: Pre-sprint capture status set by /sillok-add. Optional on the board; sillok warns and skips if the option is missing.

project.description: Projects v2 integration. Required for v2 status transitions to function.

types.description: Expected GitHub Issue Types. Sillok verifies these exist at /sillok-init.

copyFiles.description: Gitignored files copied from the main worktree into each feature worktree.

install.description: Command run inside a fresh worktree to install dependencies.

verify.description: Verification commands. Empty strings cause the verify-gate to skip that step silently.

areas.description: Optional vertical-slice labels. Detected from project structure during /sillok-init.

natures.description: Cross-cutting nature labels (orthogonal to Issue Type).
